info.title: Deqah API
info.description: Deqah — نظام إدارة الحجوزات والمواعيد — dashboard & mobile API

message.description: Human-readable message or array of validation messages

customRoleId.description: UUID of a custom role to assign
Custom role UUID or null to clear
UUID of the custom role to assign

name.description: Display name for the custom role (min 2 characters)

permissions.description: Full list of permissions to assign to the role

toPhone.description: Phone number to send the test SMS to (E.164)

notificationId.description: UUID of a specific notification to mark as read. Omit to mark all as read.

slug.description: Unique slug identifier for the template

htmlBody.description: HTML body of the email (supports Handlebars variables)

PreviewLang.description: Language to render the template in

lang.description: Language to render the template in

context.description: Template variable values for the preview render

htmlBody.description: HTML body of the email (supports Handlebars variables)

body.example: Your appointment is confirmed for tomorrow at 10 AM.

reporterId.description: UUID of the user submitting the report

description.description: Detailed description of the problem (min 10 characters)
description.example: When clicking the confirm button on the booking form, the page throws a 500 error.

status.description: New status for the problem report

resolution.description: Optional resolution note explaining how the problem was addressed
resolution.example: Fixed in v1.4.2 — invalid form state was not cleared on re-render.

config.description: Provider-specific configuration object (keys vary per provider)

isActive.description: Whether this integration is currently active

departmentId.description: UUID of the parent seed department

verticalSlug.description: Active vertical slug to seed into the tenant

slug.description: Uppercase letters, digits, underscores. 2–32 chars. Example: STARTER, TEAM_ANNUAL.

amount.description: Amount in SAR. Omit for full refund of remaining balance.

branchId.description: Branch where the service was delivered

vatRate.description: VAT rate as a decimal (e.g. 0.15 for 15%)

dueAt.description: ISO datetime when payment is due

idempotencyKey.description: Idempotency key to prevent duplicate charges

amount.description: Partial refund amount; omit to refund the full amount

transferRef.description: Bank transfer reference number (required when approving)

invoiceId.description: Invoice to apply the coupon to

minOrderAmt.description: Minimum order amount required to use this coupon

maxUses.description: Maximum number of total redemptions allowed

serviceIds.description: Restrict coupon to specific service UUIDs

expiresAt.description: ISO datetime when the coupon expires

isActive.description: Whether the coupon is active and redeemable

minOrderAmt.description: Minimum order amount required to use this coupon

maxUses.description: Maximum number of total redemptions allowed

serviceIds.description: Restrict coupon to specific service UUIDs

expiresAt.description: ISO datetime when the coupon expires

isActive.description: Whether the coupon is active and redeemable

invoiceId.description: Invoice UUID to submit to ZATCA

sellerName.description: Legal seller name as registered with ZATCA

publishableKey.description: Tenant Moyasar publishable key (pk_test_… or pk_live_…)

secretKey.description: Tenant Moyasar secret key (sk_test_… or sk_live_…). Stored AES-256-GCM encrypted.

webhookSecret.description: Optional Moyasar webhook signing secret. Stored AES-256-GCM encrypted.

isLive.description: true if these are live (production) keys, false for test mode.

pushEnabled.description: Whether the client receives push notifications

isActive.description: Set to true to enable the account, false to disable it

reason.description: Optional reason recorded in the activity log

bio.example: Specialist in physiotherapy with 10 years of experience.

education.example: King Saud University — BSc Physical Therapy

educationAr.example: جامعة الملك سعود — بكالوريوس علاج طبيعي

identifier.description: Phone number or email address of the existing user

education.example: King Saud University — BSc Physical Therapy

educationAr.example: جامعة الملك سعود — بكالوريوس علاج طبيعي

isPublic.description: Whether the employee appears in the public directory

endTime.description: Optional end-of-day cutoff on the last day (ISO 8601). Null = full last day.

isStartTimeOnly.description: When true, only start-of-day onwards is blocked on startDate (partial first day).

reason.description: Reason for the exception (e.g. annual leave)

startTime.description: Start time in HH:MM or HH:MM:SS format

endTime.description: End time in HH:MM or HH:MM:SS format

branchId.description: Branch where the booking takes place

durationOptionId.description: Specific duration option to resolve price and duration

groupSessionId.description: Group session to attach this booking to

payAtClinic.description: Payment collected at the clinic instead of online

scheduledAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the first occurrence

durationMins.description: Duration of each session in minutes

notes.description: Notes applied to each booking in the series

intervalDays.description: Interval in days between bookings (DAILY/WEEKLY only)

occurrences.description: Number of bookings to create (mutually exclusive with until)

until.description: Last possible date for the series, inclusive (mutually exclusive with occurrences)

customDates.description: Exact list of dates for CUSTOM frequency

skipConflicts.description: Skip conflicting slots silently instead of aborting the series

clientId.description: Client to add to the waitlist

branchId.description: Branch where the service should be performed

notes.description: Additional notes for the waitlist entry

isActive.description: Whether the service is active and bookable

isHidden.description: Hide the service from public listings

hidePriceOnBooking.description: Hide the price from the booking UI

hideDurationOnBooking.description: Hide the duration from the booking UI

bufferMinutes.description: Buffer in minutes between consecutive bookings

minLeadMinutes.description: Minimum lead time before booking, in minutes

maxAdvanceDays.description: Maximum number of days in advance the service can be booked

depositEnabled.description: Whether a deposit is required at booking time

depositAmount.description: Fixed deposit amount — must not exceed price

allowRecurring.description: Whether recurring bookings are allowed for this service

allowedRecurringPatterns.description: Allowed recurrence patterns when allowRecurring is true

maxRecurrences.description: Maximum number of occurrences for a recurring booking

minParticipants.description: Minimum participants required for the session to proceed

maxParticipants.description: Maximum participants allowed in the session

reserveWithoutPayment.description: Defer payment until minParticipants is reached. Requires maxParticipants > 1

isHidden.description: Whether the service is hidden from clients

bufferMinutes.description: Buffer time in minutes after the service

minLeadMinutes.description: Minimum lead time in minutes before booking

depositAmount.description: Fixed deposit amount (must not exceed price)

minParticipants.description: Minimum participants for a group session

maxParticipants.description: Maximum participants for a group session

reserveWithoutPayment.description: Allow reservation without payment until minimum participants is reached

durationMins.description: Duration in minutes for this booking type

types.description: Booking type configurations (must include at least one)

productTagline.description: Product tagline shown under the organization name

colorPrimaryLight.description: Lighter tint of the primary color (hex)

colorPrimaryDark.description: Darker shade of the primary color (hex)

colorAccentDark.description: Darker shade of the accent color (hex)

customCss.description: Custom CSS injected into the clinic app

scopeId.description: Scope entity ID (null for global scope)

isActive.description: Whether the form is active and shown to clients

isPublic.description: Whether the rating is visible publicly

vatRate.description: VAT rate as a decimal (e.g. 0.15 for 15%)

socialMedia.description: Social media handles keyed by platform

emailHeaderShowLogo.description: Show clinic logo in email header

emailHeaderShowName.description: Show clinic name in email header

emailFooterPhone.description: Phone number shown in email footer

emailFooterWebsite.description: Website URL shown in email footer

emailFooterYoutube.description: YouTube channel URL for email footer

reminderBeforeMinutes.description: Minutes before appointment to send reminder

verticalSlug.description: Vertical slug to seed (e.g. clinic, salon)

isMain.description: Whether this is the main branch
Whether this is the main branch

employeeId.description: UUID of the employee to assign

isVisible.description: Whether the department is visible to clients
Whether the department is visible to clients

departmentId.description: UUID of the parent department, or null to unlink

isOpen.description: Whether the branch is open on this day

branchId.description: UUID of the branch to configure

schedule.description: Weekly schedule — 1 to 7 slots, one per day

branchId.description: UUID of the branch this holiday applies to

format.description: Output format — defaults to JSON when omitted

from.description: Start of reporting period (ISO 8601 date string)

to.description: End of reporting period (ISO 8601 date string)

branchId.description: Restrict report to a specific branch UUID

employeeId.description: Restrict report to a specific employee UUID

requestedBy.description: Identifier of the user who requested the report (for audit purposes)

escalateToHumanAt.description: Auto-escalate to human after N messages. Null disables.

settings.description: Free-form settings blob for future keyed configuration.

userMessage.description: The user message to send to the chatbot

clientId.description: Client UUID to associate with the session

userId.description: Staff user UUID to associate with the session

valueJson.description: Structured JSON value (for lists, nested data)

valueMedia.description: Media URL (served from MinIO or external)

branchId.description: Branch where the booking takes place

durationOptionId.description: Specific duration option to resolve price and duration

notes.example: Please prepare the room in advance

method.description: Payment method requested by the mobile client

userMessage.description: The message text sent by the client

sessionId.description: Existing chat session UUID to continue

identifier.description: Phone or email used to request the OTP

purpose.description: Whether this verifies a registration or a login OTP

branchId.description: Branch where the booking takes place

durationOptionId.description: Specific duration option to resolve price and duration

cancelNotes.description: Free-text notes about the cancellation request

organizationId.description: Target organization the caller wants to switch context to.

token.description: Reset token from the email link

name.description: Full name (required if creating new account)

password.description: Password (min 8 chars, at least 1 upper, 1 digit)

sessionToken.description: OTP session JWT received after verifying the CLIENT_PASSWORD_RESET OTP

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 chars, at least 1 uppercase letter, at least 1 digit)

newDurationMins.description: New duration in minutes (optional — keeps existing if omitted)

identifier.description: Email address or phone number (E.164 format)

invoiceId.description: Invoice UUID embedded in the payment metadata

amount.description: Amount in the smallest currency unit (halalas)

metadata.description: Metadata attached when the payment was initiated

message.description: Human-readable message from Moyasar (e.g. failure reason)
